content.text: REVIEW-PASS: 5.1.1(i) — Privacy policy claims (camera used only for on-device OCR, no analytics/location/tracking) match code: ReceiptCaptureView.swift uses AVCaptureDevice/Vision only, comment confirms "nothing leaves the device" (App/ReceiptCaptureView.swift:17-21), no location or third-party SDK imports found.
